docs.title: RAG Orchestration Skills
docs.text: Skills that orchestrate the full RAG pipeline: question → retrieval → BigQuery semantic layer → structured answer.

docs.title: What this is
docs.text:
The semantic layer is a set of BigQuery tables enriched with LLM-generated categories, topics, embeddings, and sentiment scores. Skills in this repo embed a user's question, retrieve the most relevant context, and synthesize a grounded answer — no hallucination, sources cited.

Current skills:

  • cx-rag-researcher — Customer Experience: SUMO/Kitsune forums, Zendesk tickets, Mozilla Knowledge Base

docs.title: Quick example
docs.text:
What are users saying about Firefox sync in Q1 2026?

Claude embeds the question, retrieves context from the CX semantic layer, and returns a grounded answer — no fabrication, sources cited.

docs.title: From the marketplace
docs.text:
/plugin marketplace add https://github.com/mozilla/rag-skills.git
/plugin install rag-skills

That's it. Skills load automatically in every Claude Code session.

docs.title: Prerequisites (for CX skills)
docs.text:
Skills that query BigQuery require Google Cloud credentials:

gcloud auth application-default login
gcloud config set project <project-name-from-DE>

docs.title: Updating
docs.text:
To get the latest skills after the repo is updated:

/plugin update rag-skills

docs.title: cx-rag-researcher
docs.text:
Answers questions about Mozilla user experience by querying three data sources via semantic vector search:

Source What it contains Use for SUMO / Kitsune Firefox user forum threads Sentiment, user feedback Zendesk Support tickets and bug reports Problem patterns, bugs Knowledge Base Official Mozilla support articles Guidance, solutions

Example questions: - What are users complaining about with Firefox sync? - What are the top pain points for Firefox on Android in Q1 2026? - What does official guidance say about password manager issues?

Invoke: Just ask Claude a question about Mozilla user experience — the skill triggers automatically.
